ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02302Cornell Botanic Gardens records34-4-2302Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
August 20142B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:38:52 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell Botanic Gardens records
Cornell Plantations
Cornell Botanic Gardens
34-4-2302
3.4 cubic feet.
215 items. maps/drawings
1945-2021 Diaries, maps/charts, movie film, newspapers. Newspaper clippings, brochures, drawings for proposed buildings and gardens, journals and photographs. Oversized maps, plans and drawings. Also, videotape of the "The 150th Birthday Celebration of Beebe Lake," May 1, 1988. Collection material in English 2084329
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Jude Corina
Date completed:
September 2014
EAD encoding:
Jude Corina, September 2014
Date modified:
Jude Corina, October 2014
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Newspaper clippings, brochures, drawings for proposed buildings and gardens, and photographs. Also, videotape of the "The 150th Birthday Celebration of Beebe Lake," May 1, 1988.
Includes journals kept by gardeners from 1956-1999.
Now includes oversized maps and drawings of gardens and natural areas supervised by Cornell Plantations.
RELATED MATERIALS
See also the video A Journey Through Time and Nature, Cornell Plantations Path and Robert E. Jones Cornell Plantations papers, #34-4-4130.
SERIES LIST
Series I. General files and diaries Boxes 1-4
Series II. Oversized plans, maps and drawings Mapcase Folders 1-15
Cite As:
Cornell Botanic Gardens records, #34-4-2302. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
In 2016 the Cornell Plantations changed names to the Cornell Botanic Gardens.
Videotapes. Cornell Plantations Beebe Lake (N.Y.) Cornell University -- : Description -- : Views.

inked on tracing paper, badly crumpled and torn]n.d.12No. 203: Plan of the Cornell Arboretum [pencil note on back: N. N. FitzpatrickSeptember 2, 196012
Scope and Contents
[these 22 maps are quadrants which form one large map when numbered sides are matched up]; Factory Mutual Engineering Division, Associated Factory Mutual Fire Insturance Cos. Norwood, Mass; Index No. 27015; serial numbers 51301-51322Additional plans including drawings/sketches, proposed additions, proposed Marks Conservatory and Laboratory, proposed glass enclosures, sea watch towers, boiler room, etc.; also unidentified group photo of students looking at tree1968-197613Fernow Hall1973-197814Arboretum plans193614Fish rearing pond at fish hatcheries plans193714Parking overlook north of Pit Greenhouse195914Cross sectionsn.d.14Location plan - new creek channel193914Details for dam - Cascadilla Creek - east of ROTC stables193714Bridge details - Cascadilla Creek19371426 plans concerning planting development; general site plans; grading, storm drainage, plumbing and electrical; other construction detailsn.d.15
Scope and Contents

Scope and Contents
[these 22 maps are quadrants which form one large map when numbered sides are matched up]; Factory Mutual Engineering Division, Associated Factory Mutual Fire Insturance Cos. Norwood, Mass; Index No. 27015; serial numbers 51301-51322Additional plans including drawings/sketches, proposed additions, proposed Marks Conservatory and Laboratory, proposed glass enclosures, sea watch towers, boiler room, etc.; also unidentified group photo of students looking at tree1968-197613Fernow Hall1973-197814Arboretum plans193614Fish rearing pond at fish hatcheries plans193714Parking overlook north of Pit Greenhouse195914Cross sectionsn.d.14Location plan - new creek channel193914Details for dam - Cascadilla Creek - east of ROTC stables193714Bridge details - Cascadilla Creek19371426 plans concerning planting development; general site plans; grading, storm drainage, plumbing and electrical; other construction detailsn.d.15
